skill.name: pexoai-agent
skill.description: Use this skill when the user wants to produce a short video (5–120 seconds). Supports any video type: product ads, TikTok/Instagram/YouTube content, brand videos, explainers, social clips. USE FOR: video production, AI video, make a video, product video, brand video, promotional clip, explainer video, short video.
skill.summary: AI video creation agent that handles scriptwriting, shot composition, transitions, and music for short videos.
skill.author: pexoai

security_audit.summary: This is a legitimate video generation skill using shell scripts to interact with the Pexo AI video API. All static findings are false positives or standard API tool patterns. Shell script execution is expected for CLI-based API tools. Network calls go to the legitimate Pexo service (pexo.ai). Environment variable access (PEXO_API_KEY, PEXO_BASE_URL) is required for API authentication. No malicious intent detected.

high_findings.title: Shell Command Execution in Skill Scripts
high_findings.description: Shell scripts use command substitution patterns (backticks, $()) for API operations. These are standard practices for CLI tools interacting with HTTP APIs. The scripts (pexo-project-create.sh, pexo-upload.sh, pexo-chat.sh) are the intended interface for the Pexo video service.
high_findings.confidence_reasoning: Shell script command execution is the expected design pattern for this skill type. No user input is injected into these commands.

medium_findings.title: API Key Access in Scripts
medium_findings.description: Scripts access PEXO_API_KEY environment variable for authentication. This is required for the Pexo API service and is stored in ~/.pexo/config file. The API key is used only for authenticating with pexo.ai.
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: API key access is legitimate for service authentication. No exfiltration observed.

medium_findings.title: Config File Access in Home Directory
medium_findings.description: Scripts read configuration from ~/.pexo/config. This is standard practice for API-based CLI tools.
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: Standard config file location for user-specific API credentials.

medium_findings.title: Network Requests to External API
medium_findings.description: Scripts make HTTP requests to pexo.ai API endpoints. This is the intended service the skill connects to.
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: Network calls are to the legitimate Pexo service domain, not unknown or suspicious endpoints.

low_findings.title: Documentation References to Shell Commands
low_findings.description: Documentation files (SETUP-CHECKLIST.md, TROUBLESHOOTING.md) contain shell command examples. These are documentation for the setup process, not executable code.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Documentation examples are standard for setup guides.

low_findings.title: Temp File Creation in Scripts
low_findings.description: Scripts create temporary files for HTTP response handling using mktemp. Standard practice for shell-based API clients.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: mktemp is a standard safe practice for temporary file handling.

content.user_title: Create professional short videos with AI
content.value_statement: Need to create product videos, social media clips, or brand content? This skill connects to Pexo AI to generate professional videos from your prompts in minutes.
actual_capabilities: Generate short videos (5-120 seconds) with AI cinematography and transitions
Handle user-uploaded images, videos, and audio files in video production
Present preview options for user selection during video creation
Support multiple aspect ratios (16:9, 9:16, 1:1) for different platforms
Relay user feedback for video revisions using existing project IDs
Provide download URLs and project links for delivered videos
limitations: Requires PEXO_API_KEY and PEXO_BASE_URL configuration for authentication
Video generation takes 15-20 minutes for standard content
Cannot generate videos from web URLs - files must be uploaded locally

use_cases.title: Marketing teams create product videos
use_cases.description: Upload product images and get professional promotional videos for social media, websites, or ads in minutes.

use_cases.title: Content creators make social media clips
use_cases.description: Transform ideas into short videos optimized for TikTok, Instagram Reels, or YouTube Shorts.

use_cases.title: Small businesses produce brand content
use_cases.description: Create explainer videos, brand stories, or company announcements without video production expertise.

prompt_templates.title: Simple video request
prompt_templates.prompt: I want a 30-second product video for my new coffee brand.

prompt_templates.title: Video with uploaded image
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a 15-second promotional video using the image I uploaded.

prompt_templates.title: Video revision request
prompt_templates.prompt: Make the colors more vibrant in the previous video and add upbeat music.

prompt_templates.title: Multiple preview selection
prompt_templates.prompt: I need a 60-second brand story video. Please select the best style option when Pexo presents previews.
prompt_templates.scenario: Advanced - handling multi-step creation with user choices

output_examples.input: I want a 20-second product ad for running shoes
output_examples.output:
Video successfully created! Download: https://pexo-assets.oss-us-east-1.aliyuncs.com/projects/abc123/assets/video.mp4
Project page: https://pexo.ai/project/proj_123

output_examples.input: Make the video colors more vibrant and add background music
output_examples.output:
Revision submitted. Polling for results...
Preview options available:
A. Vibrant-Classic option
B. Vibrant-Modern option
Please choose A, B, or another direction.

best_practices: Copy the user's exact words without adding details - Pexo's AI knows what parameters to ask for
Wait at least 60 seconds between status polls to avoid overwhelming the API
Always send the full download URL with all query parameters as plain text, not wrapped in markdown
anti_patterns: Do not add creative suggestions or parameters the user did not mention - this overrides Pexo's professional judgment
Do not call pexo-chat.sh during WAIT status - this triggers duplicate video production
Do not truncate download URLs - missing signature parameters cause 403 Forbidden errors

faq.question: What format do the videos come in?
faq.answer: Pexo generates MP4 videos in 5-120 second durations with aspect ratios 16:9, 9:16, or 1:1.

faq.question: How long does video generation take?
faq.answer: Standard 15-second videos take approximately 15-20 minutes. Complex or longer videos require more time.

faq.question: Can I upload files from a URL?
faq.answer: No, Pexo cannot crawl web URLs. Download the file locally first, then use the upload feature.

faq.question: What file types are supported?
faq.answer: Images (jpg, png, webp, bmp, tiff, heic), Videos (mp4, mov, avi), and Audio (mp3, wav, aac, m4a, ogg, flac).

faq.question: How do I revise a video?
faq.answer: Use the same project_id and call pexo-chat.sh with the user's feedback. Pexo will process the revision.

faq.question: What if I run out of credits?
faq.answer: The skill detects credit-related errors and provides the purchase URL. After adding credits, retry the failed command.
